name: Grandma Hilda's Apple Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix eggs, oil, sugar, salt, and vanilla together.
2. Combine flour with baking powder.
3. Add the flour and baking powder mixture slowly to the egg mixture until smooth.
4. Divide the dough in half.
5. Grease and flour a large pan.
6. Roll out the dough to fit the pan without making it too thin.
7. Spoon grated apples evenly around the pan on top of the dough.
8. Sprinkle brown sugar over the apples if desired.
9. Cover the apples with the remaining dough, which has been rolled out.
10. Sprinkle cinnamon and sugar on top.
11. Prick the dough with a fork to allow steam to escape.
12. Bake at 350°F until a toothpick inserted in the center comes out clean.
Makes 2 9-inch pies or one 9 x 13 version (approximately).
